sub_pixel_system.notes: Light gun shooter; player controls stationary reticle, not character movement

special_mechanics.name: Light Gun Aiming
special_mechanics.description: Player uses NES Zapper to aim and destroy incoming enemy spacecraft, bombs, missiles, and asteroids. No direct character physics.

special_mechanics.name: Shield System
special_mechanics.description: Player spacecraft shield depletes with each missed shot. Shield can be repaired by collecting shield-repairing items.

special_mechanics.name: Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Powerful bomb destroys everything on screen; comet power-up grants temporary protection from limited number of hits.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Light gun shooter with no character locomotion physics. Game focuses on aiming reflexes and timing rather than character movement mechanics. No jump, gravity, acceleration, or sub-pixel data applicable.
